title: Noah Lucas homepage v034 cross-variant interview positioning
changeSummary: Reconciles the applied-AI, defense/physical-AI, frontier-research, and mission-systems resume variants into one interview-facing homepage message.
Positions Noah as a Physical AI & Frontier Systems product executive for aerospace/space, robotics/autonomy, edge-data, telemetry, and mission-critical infrastructure companies.
Keeps the expanded Postmates proof as supporting evidence rather than the homepage's primary identity, and preserves all glass, logo, image, and responsive behavior.
Leaves the production pointer and live Squarespace site unchanged.

validation.method: Local HTTP server plus in-app browser at 1280x720; DOM, overflow, and console checks.
checks: Identity, thesis, principles, research, investments, metadata, and footer reflect the cross-variant interview positioning.
Sift, Anduril, Pendulum, Serve, and expanded Postmates evidence remain intact without horizontal overflow.
No browser console warnings or errors were observed.
